name: RPlog_Alois_vs_Maethor
title: Alois vs. Maethor
summary: Perched on crates beside his Lambda shuttle the Corellian Hope, the aging operative Alois shadows the retired Imperial Stormtrooper Maethor as he steps off a planetary shuttle into a Corellian spaceport. With no real plan, Alois ambushes him, and despite his age proves quick -- but Maethor, a former Royal Guardsman, draws his heavy blaster and the scuffle erupts into a running fight of fists, daggers, blaster bolts, and stun grenades. Alois slashes a nasty gash into Maethor's leg, yet the soldier's resistance training shrugs off the flashbangs as CorSec officers and sirens converge on the much-attacked spaceport. Wounded but relentless, Maethor pursues the fleeing Alois through gas clouds and into the streets, scoring a hit on Alois's blast-vested arm while four CorSec agents close in behind. The brawl ends with both men battered and the law bearing down, Maethor rolling clear of one last lobbed device.
